message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml

entity "app_translation\n((Translations))" as app_translation <<I>> {
  <u>label</u> string
  description longText
  privacyPolicyExtensions longText
  <u>createdAt</u> createdAt
  updatedAt updatedAt
  **appId** foreignKey
  **languageId** foreignKey
}

entity "app_action_button_translation\n((Translations))" as app_action_button_translation <<I>> {
  <u>label</u> string
  <u>createdAt</u> createdAt
  updatedAt updatedAt
  **appActionButtonId** foreignKey
  **languageId** foreignKey
}

entity "app_action_button\n(App action buttons)" as app_action_button <<T>> {
  **id** id
  <u>entity</u> string
  <u>view</u> string
  <u>url</u> string
  <u>action</u> string
  <u>openNewTab</u> bool
  label translated
  <u>appId</u> foreignKey
  <u>createdAt</u> createdAt
  updatedAt updatedAt
  translated json
}

entity "app_template\n(App templates)" as app_template <<T>> {
  **id** id
  <u>template</u> longText
  <u>path</u> string
  <u>active</u> bool
  <u>appId</u> foreignKey
  <u>createdAt</u> createdAt
  updatedAt updatedAt
}

entity "app\n(Apps)" as app <<T>> {
  **id** id
  <u>name</u> string
  <u>path</u> string
  author string
  copyright string
  license string
  <u>active</u> bool
  <u>configurable</u> bool
  privacy string
  <u>version</u> string
  iconRaw blob
  icon string
  appSecret string
  modules list
  cookies list
  label translated
  description translated
  privacyPolicyExtensions translated
  <u>integrationId</u> foreignKey
  <u>aclRoleId</u> foreignKey
  <u>createdAt</u> createdAt
  updatedAt updatedAt
  translated json
}

circle "language" as language <<T>>
circle "integration" as integration <<T>>
circle "acl_role" as acl_role <<T>>
circle "custom_field_set" as custom_field_set <<T>>
circle "webhook" as webhook <<T>>

app_translation --> app
app_translation --> language
app_action_button_translation --> app_action_button
app_action_button_translation --> language
app_action_button --> app
app_template --> app
app --> integration
app --> acl_role
app --> custom_field_set
app --> webhook

@enduml
```
